allow: PowerShell($cargo = Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cargo\) { "cargo: $\($cargo.Source\)"; cargo --version } else { "cargo: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($base = "D:\\a\\claude-cli-internal\\claude-cli-internal\\node_modules\\@anthropic-ai\\sandbox-runtime"; if \(Test-Path $base\) { "package dir EXISTS: $base"; Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Filter "srt-win.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; "--- Cargo.toml files ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Filter "Cargo.toml" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName } else { "package dir NOT FOUND at: $base" })
